name: My GM Rewards Mastercard

welcome_offer.description: Earn 30,000 bonus points after spending $1,000 on purchases in the first 90 days of account opening

earning_rates.category: Eligible GM purchases (vehicle purchases, service, parts, accessories at GM dealers)
earning_rates.notes: 7x points per $1 on eligible GM purchases when using the card, plus up to 3x points as a GM Rewards member (up to 10x total)
3x points per $1 on all other purchases (updated as of May 2025 program revamp — previously 4x)

other_benefits.name: 0% intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 9 months on qualifying GM purchases over $499; then 22.24%–32.24% variable APR

other_benefits.name: GM Rewards program integration
other_benefits.description: Points can be redeemed toward new GM vehicles, services, parts, and accessories

sources.notes: Barclays/GM press release — May 2025 program revamp
NerdWallet — 5 Things to Know About GM Credit Card

notes: The new GM Rewards Mastercard launched May 20, 2025, replacing the previous Marcus-issued GM card. Earns up to 10x points on GM purchases (7x from card + up to 3x as GM Rewards member). Previously offered 4x on all purchases; updated to 3x on non-GM as of the 2025 revamp. 30,000 point bonus worth ~$300 toward GM. Points worth 1 cent each toward GM purchases.
